title: santaloides minor subsp. monadelpha
intro: Santaloides minor subsp. monadelpha, also known as Santalum ellipticum, is a species of sandalwood tree native to Hawaii and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Santalum ellipticum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Santalum ellipticum is often used in teas, essential oils, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
